## Verdict legend

---

## Suggested execution order

1. **KILL** rows first â€” clears noise, prevents Google indexing rot.
2. **REVIEW-CLUSTER** rows next â€” pick canonicals before writing anything new on the same topic.
3. **MERGE** rows after clusters are decided â€” easy 301s.
4. **RETITLE** rows â€” title/meta tweaks only, no body changes; biggest CTR/impressions wins per minute of work.
5. **EXPAND** rows â€” last, because each one is a content project. Prefer expanding pages that already have inbound links and traffic.
6. Only then start the new 50-pillar plan.
